_.$description: Truncate collapse trigger button background color.

hover.$description: Truncate collapse trigger button background color on hover, focus, and focus-within.

text.$description: Truncate collapse trigger button text color.

_.$description: Truncate expand trigger button text color.

hover.$description: Truncate expand trigger button text color on hover and focus.

focus.$description: Truncate expand and collapse trigger button focus-visible ring shadow.
